scripts.apply:site-i18n: node scripts/_gen-site-locales.mjs && node scripts/apply-site-translations.js && node scripts/verify-site-i18n.js
scripts.web: npm run prepare:web && npx --yes serve www -l 4173
scripts.web:lan: npm run prepare:web && npx --yes serve www -l tcp://0.0.0.0:4173
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init "Heaven's Clock" com.heavensclock.app --web-dir www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
